items.title: 'Cannot remain silent': Egypt escalate World Cup row, file FIFA complaint against Letexier over Argentina controversy
items.summary: Egyptian Football Association president Hany Abo Rida has reportedly filed an official complaint with FIFA against Letexier and his assistants.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Chris Sutton's World Cup quarter-final predictions
items.summary: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the quarter-final ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Norway.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Holden clings on to keep Middlesex hopes alive
items.summary: Hard-fought 62 on tough pitch make it back-to-back wins
